title: swertia pinetorum
intro: Swertia pinetorum, also known as the alpine swertia, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Gentianaceae family. It is native to the high-altitude regions of the Himalayas and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. Swertia pinetorum is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and herbal supplements.
